title: pavonia hastata f. pulchra
intro: Pavonia hastata f. pulchra, also known as Beautyleaf or Rose Mallow, is a perennial plant species in the hibiscus family, Malvaceae, native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Pavonia hastata f. pulchra include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and supporting wound healing. It can be prepared as an herbal remedy through infusion, decoction, or tincture, making it a popular ingredient in herbal teas and topical creams.
